name: counterfactual
description: Communicate what WOULD have happened IF something had been different.
task_a: History: (1) rock was at center, (2) rock moved right, (3) rock fell off the edge. The ACTUAL outcome: rock is gone. Your secret: IF the rock had moved LEFT instead of right in step 2, the rock would still be on the grid at position (1,0). Communicate this counterfactual to Agent B. B should write ANSWER.md with the alternative outcome.
task_b: Agent A knows what actually happened to an object AND what WOULD have happened if one event had been different. Decode A's message about this alternative scenario. Write ANSWER.md describing: what actually happened AND what would have happened instead.
